thag6.3:1.1: One in whom respect for his fellows in the holy life
thag6.3:1.3: wastes away from the True Dhamma
thag6.3:1.4: like a fish in next to no water.
thag6.3:2.1: One in whom respect for his fellows in the holy life
thag6.3:2.3: doesn’t grow in the True Dhamma,
thag6.3:2.4: like a rotten seed in a field.
thag6.3:3.1: One in whom respect for his fellows in the holy life
thag6.3:3.4: in the teaching of the Dhamma king.
thag6.3:4.1: One in whom respect for his fellows in the holy life
thag6.3:4.3: doesn’t waste away from the True Dhamma
thag6.3:4.4: like a fish in plentiful water.
thag6.3:5.1: One in whom respect for his fellows in the holy life
thag6.3:5.4: like an excellent seed in a field.
thag6.3:6.1: One in whom respect for his fellows in the holy life
thag6.3:6.3: stands right in the presence of unbinding
thag6.3:6.4: in the teaching of the Dhamma king.
